title: rich shattering tunisian fish tagine
description: rich and flavorful tagine featuring tender fish, rich fish sauce, and a shattering texture from the potatoes. perfect for a post-workout meal.

ingredients.name: gulf fish fillets
ingredients.notes: any firm white fish suitable for tagine

ingredients.name: spices
ingredients.notes: a mix of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
add the onion, garlic, and spices and saut3 until the onion is translucent.
add the fish fillets and cook until browned on both sides.
add the chopped potatoes, carrots, and celery and stir to combine.
pour in the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the fish is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
stir in the fish sauce and lemon juice.
serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
